title: Zucchini Bread
description: A classic, moist zucchini bread with cinnamon and vanilla. Simple, reliable, and makes two loaves.

instructions.text: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease two standard loaf pans.
In a large bowl, cream together the beaten eggs, sugar, vanilla, and oil until well combined.
In a separate bowl, sift together flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until just combined. Fold in the shredded zucchini.
Divide batter evenly between the two greased loaf pans. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Cool in pans for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack. Slice when fully cooled.

notes:
Don't peel the zucchini -- the skin shreds fine and adds color.

No need to squeeze out the zucchini moisture for this recipe; it contributes to the bread's moist texture.

Freezes well -- wrap individual slices or whole loaves tightly. Thaws at room temperature in a few hours.
